---
title: SCOPE_MAP generator
type: AFK
labels: [needs-triage]
spec: docs/specs/kanban-slice-refactor.md (§9)
---

## What to build

Auto-generated `<projectDir>/SCOPE_MAP.md` index of slices. Regenerates on every slice mutation (add/rename/move/cancel/delete). Hand edits overwritten — header comment communicates this.

Format per spec §9:

```markdown
<!-- Auto-generated by aihub. Do not edit by hand. -->
# Scope map — PRO-238

| Slice | Title | Status | Hill |
|-------|-------|--------|------|
| ...   | ...   | ...    | ...  |
```

Atomic write (temp + rename) — reuse helper from #1.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `regenerateScopeMap(projectId)` produces deterministic output ordered by slice ID
- [ ] Wired into `slices add` (from #2) so SCOPE_MAP exists immediately after first slice add
- [ ] Atomic write: partial regen never leaves a truncated file
- [ ] Concurrent regens on same project serialize (no interleaved writes)
- [ ] Unit tests cover empty project, single slice, multi-slice, atomic write
- [ ] `pnpm test:shared` (or relevant scope) passes

## Blocked by

- #1 Slice storage primitives
